category_sources: Official GNOME Wiki page describes Yelp Tools as programs for creating, editing, managing, and publishing Mallard or DocBook documentation.
source_facts.description says yelp-tools helps create and edit Mallard or DocBook documentation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GNOME GitLab project named yelp-tools.
docs_sources: Official GNOME Wiki Archive page for Apps/Yelp/Tools documents yelp-build, yelp-check, yelp-new, and yelp.m4.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GNOME GitLab source project URL and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and the official GNOME Wiki page identify Mallard and DocBook documentation tooling.
source_facts.executables lists command-line tools yelp-build, yelp-check, and yelp-new.
